---
title: "Selwyn William Moberly"
---

## Selwyn William Moberly

**Dates:** (1854-1871)

### Description

seventh and youngest son of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

His death aged 16 on 8 April 1871 was reported by the <i>Pall Mall Gazette</i> (11 April 1871).

### Letters

- Letter from May 20th [1871?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Friday [23 March 1855]
- Letter from May 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
